waves.title: KARIMO Setup And Baseline
waves.goal: Create the PRD execution contract and prove the existing repo is healthy before product edits.

tasks.title: Bootstrap KARIMO repo state
acceptance: KARIMO assets exist in the canonical repo
Installer defects are documented as setup notes

tasks.title: Run baseline quality gates
acceptance: Typecheck, targeted API tests, gymapp tests, and member UI preview are recorded
verification: pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/nutrition.test.mjs tests/routes/workouts.test.mjs tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/ai-quality.test.mjs
CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts

waves.title: Logging Data Model And Compatibility
waves.goal: Add richer metadata without breaking old logs.

tasks.title: Extend nutrition log metadata
acceptance: Entries can preserve source, confidence, ingredients, serving grams, barcode fields, and correction metadata
Existing entries still load

tasks.title: Extend workout session metadata
acceptance: Sets can preserve type, RPE/RIR, previous-set reference, and notes
Existing sessions still load

waves.title: Cal AI Style Food Logging V1
waves.goal: Make food logging faster and more correctable.

tasks.title: Build unified quick-log modes
acceptance: Photo, manual/search, recent relog, and barcode placeholder modes are visible
Failed AI analysis routes to manual draft without losing user intent
verification: CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts -g "nutrition"

tasks.title: Add AI draft correction
acceptance: Users can edit item name, servings, grams, ingredients, and macros before saving
Low confidence is visible and actionable

tasks.title: Add food history relogging
acceptance: Recent foods are available for one-tap relogging
Deleted foods do not appear as broken stale records

waves.title: Hevy Style Workout Logging V1
waves.goal: Make repeated workout logging faster and history-aware.

tasks.title: Add previous-set autofill
acceptance: Starting a saved plan preloads last known weights and reps when history exists
New users still see sane defaults

tasks.title: Add advanced set fields
acceptance: Sets support warmup, normal, drop, failure, RPE/RIR, and notes
API accepts old and new set shapes

tasks.title: Add exercise history surface
acceptance: Exercise cards show recent/best history
Workout session can expose previous performance before logging
verification: CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts -g "workout"

waves.title: Progression And Coaching
waves.goal: Add explainable suggestions without making AI autonomous.

tasks.title: Add progression hints
acceptance: Suggestions are derived from local history and are editable
No plan mutates without user action

tasks.title: Feed corrected logs into AI memory boundary
acceptance: Durable patterns can improve future suggestions
Raw noisy logs are not stored as memory

waves.title: QA Polish And Release Gate
waves.goal: Turn the upgrade into a release candidate.

tasks.title: Add browser and regression coverage
acceptance: Food quick-log and workout logging states have focused tests
Migration paths are covered
verification: CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/ui-preview.spec.ts

tasks.title: Run internal beta verification
acceptance: Internal beta gate passes or external blockers are documented exactly

waves.title: Data-Centered AI Logging Infrastructure
waves.goal: Add provider-backed food lookup, normalized workout history, mature AI telemetry foundations, and generated API contracts.

tasks.title: Write JSON execution contract
acceptance: Contract includes scripts, directions, standards, pass/fail criteria, fallbacks, APIs, database structures, and AI data maturity expectations

tasks.title: Add food lookup and AI infrastructure schema
acceptance: Schema supports food catalog, member custom foods, lookup telemetry, prompt versions, and inference events
Migration avoids destructive operations

tasks.title: Add server-side food APIs
acceptance: Search, barcode lookup, and custom food save stay behind the API
Open Food Facts, optional USDA, curated India-aware fallback, and telemetry paths exist

tasks.title: Add normalized workout history APIs
acceptance: Completed sets persist in normalized history
Exercise history, custom exercise, analytics, and metric-specific PR routes exist

waves.title: End-To-End Member UX And Real User Test
waves.goal: Connect the data foundation to visible member flows and document real-user pass/fail scripts.

tasks.title: Add member food API helper
acceptance: Food search items convert to log drafts with source, provider, confidence, portion, and barcode metadata
Barcode miss becomes label/manual fallback

tasks.title: Connect member food search and barcode lookup
acceptance: Nutrition search uses API results with local curated fallback
Barcode lookup populates an editable draft and miss/error paths do not block logging
Corrected/manual foods save through the custom food API best-effort path
verification: CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts -g "nutrition preview"

tasks.title: Connect workout history to every start path
acceptance: Quick starts, AI starts, assigned workouts, saved plans, and added exercises hydrate previous sets when history exists
Active workout exercise cards show last date, last set, and best estimated 1RM

tasks.title: Write real-user validation plan
acceptance: Plan covers Indian mixed-diet food search, barcode fallback, AI photo correction, and repeated workout logging
Pass/fail and fallback criteria are explicit

tasks.title: Run final release gates
acceptance: Targeted tests, typecheck, E2E preview, and internal beta gate pass under Node 22
verification: pnpm --dir artifacts/api-server test -- tests/routes/foods.test.mjs tests/routes/nutrition.test.mjs tests/routes/workouts.test.mjs tests/routes/ai.test.mjs tests/routes/ai-quality.test.mjs
CI=1 pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/member-flows.spec.ts -g "nutrition preview"
mise exec node@22 -- pnpm run verify:internal-beta
